entries.text: Invoicing: create branded PDF invoices with line items, VAT (default 7.5%) and Withholding tax. Each invoice carries a verification reference customers can check at /verify
Invoicing: send approved invoices to customers over WhatsApp directly from the invoice drawer
Invoicing: create an invoice draft from an approved Farm Sale in one click
Tenant logo upload under Settings → Branding now appears on invoice PDFs
Treasury account cards on Funding Events with per-bank reconciliation status, balance sparkline, and a statement drawer for linking outflows
Sessions & Security page at /profile/sessions to see and sign out active devices, with location and last-seen
Audit log entries now show before / after change details and the originating request body
Public verification page at /verify so a recipient can confirm an invoice was issued by your tenant
Vendors & Customers form now properly records the type (Vendor, Customer, or Both) and renders colour-coded badges in the table
Vendors can now be removed from the list (deactivates them so existing records stay intact)
Phone numbers now use a split-segment input with the country code as a non-editable prefix and digit-only enforcement so users can't submit malformed numbers
AR invoice form clearly marks Bank account as required, with a short caption and a Submit button that is disabled until the invoice is valid
AR invoices include a slide-in detail drawer showing line items, payment account, and tax summary alongside the existing actions
Public verification page no longer redirects to /login or shows a "Checking session" overlay
Removing a vendor now reflects in the UI immediately
Vendors & Customers list no longer serves stale data after a create, edit, or remove
AR invoice PDF: Unit Price no longer overlaps the Amount column and the Amount column now has visible right padding
Duplicate vendor or customer codes return a clear conflict message instead of a 500
Sale-event → invoice shortcut: the Create Invoice action now appears on posted sales (it was checking the wrong status)
Invoice submission errors now read in plain English ("Bank account is required before submission") instead of internal field names
New-login email notifications include device, IP, and approximate location
Role-based access now denies by default when a route has no role metadata
Public endpoints (like the invoice verification check) are no longer rejected by the role guard
OTP codes are no longer logged outside development environments
Temporary passwords issued on user creation are now unique per user
Full audit log access is restricted to Super Admin
Cash flow statement no longer errors on unclassified items
Staging and platform subdomains now correctly reserved
Updated error monitoring for better issue tracking
API now correctly restricts access to FlockPilot domains only
Database connection failures no longer crash audit logging
Critical security update applied to Next.js framework
Chat dropdown menus now readable in light mode
Self-service pages (profile, payslips, notifications) now accessible to all roles
Finance status cards now show net liability and credit-noted entries
Tenant control page now has summary cards, filters, and chips
Admin user fields added to Create Tenant form
Trial duration extended from 7 to 14 days
Trial provisioning no longer crashes when admin user is missing
